prompt: An oil painting in the style of the Hudson River School, mid-19th century. A vast, majestic wilderness landscape featuring a towering, rugged mountain peak. A single, winding, steep path snakes down from the sunlit summit through deep rocky shadows and jagged cliffs, eventually leading into a lush, peaceful valley floor illuminated by a brilliant, golden glow. The composition utilizes dramatic chiaroscuro and atmospheric perspective to create a sense of immense scale and depth. Fine, detailed brushwork on textured canvas, rich earth tones, no text, no labels, no diagrams.
tradition_approach: Utilized the 'Sublime' aesthetic and chiaroscuro to represent the loss landscape. The winding path toward the illuminated valley floor symbolizes the optimization process navigating a complex terrain to reach a global minimum.
